### Artist Biography (Allegedly Faked)
- German rapper of Ukrainian-Belarusian origin, real name: Olexsiy Kusrov
- Born February 25, 1988 in Kiev, moved to Germany at age 6
- Career: Signed by Frankfurt rappers Slo and Abdi in 2011, label 385idéal
- Albums: Authentic Athletic (2012), Nu eta da (2014), Masta (2015), Straßencocktail (2015), Makadam (2016), Rolexesh (2018), Radioaktiv (2018), Augen Husky (2019), Matador (2024)
- Style: Hard street rap, aggressive, themes of street life, poverty, crime, drugs, gambling, prostitution
- Influences: West Coast hip hop, G-funk, French rap, Latin music
- Achievements: First rapper to reach #1 in German charts, gold single "Magisch", German citizenship in 2024, net worth $5M
